name: Target Energy Limited
description: Target Energy Limited was an Australia-based company primarily engaged in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas properties, with a focus on projects in the United States, such as the Fairway and East Chalkley projects. The company operated within the energy sector, managing various oil and gas assets. Following its operational activities, the company eventually entered into liquidation, as noted in its final corporate filings on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX). It was headquartered in West Perth, Western Australia, and maintained a portfolio centered on energy exploration and production.
